rawAssistant: Before you head out, make sure to check the planks at least once more - lanterns were blown out last gale, and we don't want any loose boards causing trouble in the morning rush. Check for loose slats or damage that might be hiding in plain sight. Can't have you worrying about a broken plank when there's a storm brewin' on the horizon.
